ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the city's transit authority */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "transit_website" TEXT /* URL of the city's transit authority website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the stop is located */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "on_street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street where the stop is located */,
  "at_street_name" TEXT /* Name of the intersecting street where the stop is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., bus stop, train station) */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the stop is wheelchair accessible */,
  "shelter_available" INTEGER /* Whether a shelter is available at the stop */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stop information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the route operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the route is currently active */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., local, express) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of service (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of service */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_routes" (
  "stop_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-route association */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the route started serving the stop */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the route stopped serving the stop (if applicable) */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of service at the stop */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stop-route association was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_routes_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service change */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., new route, route modification, service removal) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was implemented */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the change became effective */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the service change */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the service change was approved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the service change was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_changes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the log entry */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was approved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the log entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES service_changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., transit planner, operations manager, public user) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last time the user was active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., stops, routes, service changes) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the direction (e.g., East, West) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the direction */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the direction */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the direction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the direction information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_directions_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_directions" (
  "stop_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-direction association */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stop */,
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the direction */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop along the direction */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time from the stop */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stop-direction association was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_directions_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("direction_id") REFERENCES route_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_directions_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)
